subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Most Great Countenance of the All-Glorious Beauty and the Most Exalted Perfection through celestial manifestations and heavenly outpourings [3.5s]

subcodes.subjects: @the human soul, @knowledge; recognition of God, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual transformation
